method: SkillOpt-adapted rollout -> judge -> validation-gate (citation tier, wave A)
held_out_queries: Which edition of The Bluebook does HLR require for footnotes?
A specific Bluebook edition, or just 'Bluebook standard'?

edits.summary: State the verified Bluebook EDITION (22nd) the skill previously omitted (it named the Bluebook and HLR's co-publisher role but never the edition); kept as current-but-confirm live-check since editions are periodically revised.
edits.grounded_in: official-source-map.md (verified quote: 'footnotes should conform to the 22nd edition of The Bluebook')
